data.title: Hiscox updates total voting rights following treasury share holdings
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hiscox ( (GB:HSX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Hiscox Ltd has reported that as of 30 April 2026 its issued ordinary share capital consists of 330,165,171 shares with a par value of 6.5 pence each, of which 7,523,190 shares are held in treasury. As treasury shares carry no voting rights, the total number of voting rights in the company stands at 322,641,981, a figure shareholders should use when assessing disclosure obligations under transparency rules.

This update clarifies the current capital and voting structure of Hiscox, providing investors and regulators with an accurate denominator for calculating ownership thresholds. The disclosure supports compliance with market transparency requirements and helps stakeholders track any changes in significant shareholdings that could influence governance or control dynamics at the insurer.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:HSX) stock is a Buy with a £17.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Hiscox stock, see the GB:HSX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HSX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HSX is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (strong recent profitability and growth, tempered by cash-flow volatility), supported by constructive technical momentum (price above key moving averages, positive MACD). Valuation is a major positive due to a very low P/E, while the earnings call adds support via upbeat guidance and capital returns, partially offset by pricing, tax, and catastrophe-related risks.

To see Spark’s full report on HSX stock, click here.

More about Hiscox

Hiscox Ltd is an international insurance group headquartered in Hamilton, Bermuda, specialising in property and casualty insurance and reinsurance. The company focuses on a range of retail and specialty insurance lines, serving both individual and corporate clients across multiple markets.

Average Trading Volume: 1,593,553

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £4.98B

data.description:

An announcement from Quilter ( (GB:QLT) ) is now available.

Quilter plc has confirmed that, as of 30 April 2026, it has 1,389,134,354 ordinary shares in issue, with each share carrying one vote and no shares held in treasury, setting the official share capital and voting base for investors. This share count serves as the key reference figure for shareholders assessing disclosure obligations under the Financial Conduct Authority’s transparency rules, reinforcing regulatory compliance and providing clarity on voting rights and ownership thresholds.

The update ensures market participants have an accurate denominator for calculating their notifiable interests, which is essential for maintaining transparent reporting of significant shareholdings. By publicly restating its total voting rights, Quilter supports orderly market conduct and helps investors track potential changes in its shareholder structure within the UK’s disclosure regime.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:QLT) stock is a Buy with a £212.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Quilter stock, see the GB:QLT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on QLT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, QLT is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid fundamentals (cash generation and low leverage) and a strong, confident earnings-call outlook with robust flow momentum and shareholder-return commitments. Offsetting factors are weaker near-term technicals and only moderate valuation support, alongside lingering profitability volatility and a guided step-up in costs.

To see Spark’s full report on QLT stock, click here.

More about Quilter

Quilter plc is a UK-based wealth management group that provides financial advice, investment platforms and asset management services to individual and institutional clients. The company focuses on helping customers manage and grow their savings and investments, operating under the UK’s regulatory framework for listed financial services firms.

InterContinental Hotels Group PLC has disclosed that as of June 30, 2024, the company’s issued share capital comprises 168,595,550 ordinary shares, with 7,006,782 shares held in treasury, resulting in a total of 161,588,768 voting rights. Shares purchased and subject to cancellation since the last report on June 3, 2024, have been considered cancelled in these calculations. data.title: R8 Capital Shares Suspended as Shell Group Lines Up Convertible Loan Funding
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Mode Global Holdings Plc ( (GB:MODE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

R8 Capital Investments Plc has had trading in its ordinary shares temporarily suspended from the FCA’s Official List and the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market, after missing the deadline to publish its FY25 results. The company expects to release those results by the end of June and will then seek to have the suspension lifted, limiting share liquidity in the meantime and adding timing pressure to its reporting obligations.

Alongside the suspension, R8 Capital has entered into non-binding, conditional heads of terms for a proposed fundraising of at least £500,000 via convertible loan notes. Completion of the subscription, targeted on or before 11 May 2026 and subject to KYC and AML checks, would provide fresh capital to support the shell company’s future transactions and may influence its strategic options once trading in the shares resumes.

More about Mode Global Holdings Plc

R8 Capital Investments Plc is a shell company listed in the Equity Shares (Shell Companies) category on the Main Market of the London Stock Exchange. As an investment vehicle, it focuses on capital-raising and corporate transactions rather than operating a traditional trading business, using its listing to facilitate future deals and investments.

Average Trading Volume: 297,401

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £1.07M

See more insights into MODE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Morgan Sindall Discloses Gifted Shares to CEO’s Closely Associated Person
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Morgan Sindall ( (GB:MGNS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Morgan Sindall Group has disclosed a share transaction involving a person closely associated with its chief executive, John Morgan, in line with Market Abuse Regulation requirements. The notification states that Mrs Rosalind Morgan received a specific gift of 9,014 ordinary shares of 5p each from the estate of a family member, held jointly with two other individuals, in a transaction conducted outside a trading venue on 28 April 2026.

The disclosure underscores the company’s adherence to insider dealing and transparency rules governing dealings by persons discharging managerial responsibilities and their closely associated persons. While the transaction does not reflect an on-market trade or a change in executive remuneration, it ensures investors are informed about changes in the beneficial interests of those connected to senior management, supporting ongoing confidence in the group’s governance standards.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:MGNS) stock is a Buy with a £5800.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Morgan Sindall stock, see the GB:MGNS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MGNS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MGNS is a Outperform.

The score is driven mainly by solid financial performance (consistent revenue growth, improved earnings, and manageable leverage), supported by a constructive longer-term technical trend. Valuation is reasonable with a moderate dividend, but thin margins and cash-flow volatility temper the overall rating.

To see Spark’s full report on MGNS stock, click here.

More about Morgan Sindall

Morgan Sindall Group plc is a U.K.-listed construction and regeneration group, operating through activities such as construction, infrastructure, fit-out, property services and urban regeneration. The group focuses on delivering building and infrastructure projects across public and private sectors, positioning itself as a key contractor in the British construction market.

Coca-Cola Europacific Partners has reported that, as of 30 April 2026, it has 443,217,637 ordinary shares of €0.01 in issue, each carrying one vote, with no shares held in treasury. data.title: MedPal AI moves registered office to City of London as it scales AI health platform
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from MedPal AI Plc ( (GB:MPAL) ).

MedPal AI, the AI-powered digital health group listed on AIM and in Frankfurt, has shifted its registered office to new premises on Floor 8, 71 Queen Victoria Street in the City of London. The administrative move places the company closer to London’s financial and professional services hub, which may support its growth ambitions across consumer wellness apps and AI-enabled pharmacy operations.

The company’s operations span an AI wellness app that integrates data from devices such as Apple Health, Fitbit and Garmin, and a robotic, AI-supported prescription fulfilment centre offering same-day and next-day delivery. MedPal AI’s partnerships with Epassi UK and Independent Gyms extend its reach to millions of employees and gym members, underpinning a strategy to expand into B2B licensing for healthcare providers, employers and insurers.

More about MedPal AI Plc

MedPal AI is a UK-based digital health company focused on AI-driven wellness management and automated pharmacy services. Its flagship app aggregates data from more than 100 wearables and health platforms to deliver non-clinical, personalised lifestyle coaching, while its subsidiary runs a 24/7 AI-powered pharmacy distribution centre serving NHS and private prescriptions.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell
